message:
test(unit)+fix: expand suffix_array (48) and adaptive_radix_tree (47) inline tests, fix iter() key reconstruction

suffix_array: 20 → 48 tests (+28): search edge cases, overlapping patterns,
longest_repeated, distinct_substrings, display, clone, binary data, invariants

adaptive_radix_tree: 22 → 47 tests (+25): contains_key, remove/reinsert,
prefix_search edge cases, iter correctness, clone, stress, 256 single-byte keys

Fix: collect_all() now includes each node's prefix in key reconstruction.
Previously root node prefix was omitted, producing empty keys for single-key trees.
(ft-c46a5, ft-i09wn)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
